{{CargoRelic
|name=SINS
|class_id=22605
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=09-12
|source=
|description=On Sept 12, 1953 AD, the strapdown inertial navigation system (SINS) was officially introduced and used.<br>The strapdown inertial navigation system is a framework-free system that does not rely on external information or emit energy outward. It has the advantage of good stealth and can operate in a variety of complex environments. It can provide accurate navigation parameters to the carrier and has higher performance and reliability than similar platform-type inertial navigation systems. Currently, it is widely used in various types of aircraft.
|fame=45
|art=41
|fth=50
|civ=36
|tech=71
|ss1=Mecha Minion ATK +3%<br>Per devotee appointed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Devotee Appointed: 50/50
|ss2=Mecha Minion ATK +4%<br>Per devotee appointed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Devotee Appointed: 50/50
|ss3=Mecha Minion ATK +5%<br>Per devotee appointed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Devotee Appointed: 50/50
|ss4=Mecha Minion ATK +7%<br>Per devotee appointed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Devotee Appointed: 50/50
|ss5=Mecha Minion ATK +9%<br>Per devotee appointed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Devotee Appointed: 50/50
|ss7=Mecha Minion ATK +9%<br>Per devotee appointed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Devotee Appointed: 50/50<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 560 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, 2x Purple Card Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, 2x Orange Card Drops +7.5%
}}
